Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

Density.description: Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

DampingRatio.description: Dynamic damping ratio, expressed as a ratio between actual damping and critical damping. For structures, typically taken as 0.02 (i.e. 2%). Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

PoissonsRatio.description: Ratio between axial and transverse strain. Used together with YoungsModulus to derive the ShearModulus for isotropic materials. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

WarpModulus.description: Modulus of elasticity of the material. Ratio between axial stress and axial strain. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

WeftModulus.description: Modulus of elasticity of the material. Ratio between axial stress and axial strain. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

ShearModulus.description: Modulus of elasticity of the material. Ratio between axial stress and axial strain. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
